# מחשבון שכר — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A web-based salary calculator tool designed to handle complex Israeli payroll scenarios. The tool accounts for unpaid break deductions beyond a set number of hours, daily travel expense reimbursements, overtime pay, and Shabbat premium pay — applying the Shabbat rate only during Shabbat hours and not after its conclusion. The focus is on accuracy and compliance with Israeli labor norms.

---

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://-0e08c51f.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://-0e08c51f.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About מחשבון שכר
A web-based salary calculator tool designed to handle complex Israeli payroll scenarios. The tool accounts for unpaid break deductions beyond a set number of hours, daily travel expense reimbursements, overtime pay, and Shabbat premium pay — applying the Shabbat rate only during Shabbat hours and not after its conclusion. The focus is on accuracy and compliance with Israeli labor norms.

## Services/Products
- חישוב שכר בסיסי
- ניכוי הפסקה לא מתוגמלת מעל כמות שעות מסוימת
- הוספת דמי נסיעה יומיים
- חישוב שעות נוספות
- חישוב שכר שבת (בזמן שבת בלבד, לא לאחר יציאתה)

## Target Audience
- בני נוער

## Industry
Payroll / HR Tools

---
